property.name: Aurelia Apartment
property.summary: An immersive 360 tour through a warm contemporary apartment with marble floors, wood detailing, city views, and a sunset terrace.

rooms.title: Entrance
rooms.name: Entrance
rooms.description: A composed arrival gallery with warm wood, marble, soft cove lighting, and a direct view into the living space.

rooms.title: Hallway
rooms.name: Hallway
rooms.description: A polished circulation spine connecting the private bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen, and main lounge.

rooms.title: Living Room
rooms.name: Living Room
rooms.description: An expansive living room with a sculptural sectional, marble media wall, dining connection, and balcony outlook.

rooms.title: Kitchen & Dining
rooms.name: Kitchen & Dining
rooms.description: A marble island kitchen and dining area with integrated appliances, pendant lighting, and elegant entertaining flow.

rooms.title: Master Bedroom
rooms.name: Master Bedroom
rooms.description: A serene primary bedroom with warm timber flooring, wardrobe wall, media niche, and balcony-facing windows.

rooms.title: Bedroom
rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.description: A bright secondary bedroom with custom storage, desk, display shelving, and soft playful details.

rooms.title: Bathroom
rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.description: A spa-like bathroom with luminous stone, glass shower, floating vanity, and integrated shelf lighting.

rooms.title: Terrace
rooms.name: Terrace
rooms.description: A sunset balcony lounge with skyline views, planting, glass railings, and indoor-outdoor living.
